ownership_missing: user-controlled key not validated against owner identity
description: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key. System uses user-provided key for authorization decisions without verifying the key belongs to the authenticated user.

ownership_missing: access control not enforced at resource level
description: Improper Access Control. The software does not restrict or incorrectly restricts access to a resource from an unauthorized actor.

ownership_missing: authorization check missing or incorrect at object level
description: Improper Authorization. Authorization check performed incorrectly failing to verify actor right to access specific object.

ownership_missing: no authorization check performed before resource access
description: Missing Authorization. Software does not perform any authorization check when actor attempts to access or modify a resource.

ownership_missing: role verification logic contains flaws allowing bypass
description: Incorrect Authorization. Authorization check is implemented with logical flaws that enable unauthorized access to protected resources.

ownership_missing: privilege level not validated for specific resource access
description: Privilege Abuse. Attacker exploits granted privileges to access resources or perform actions beyond intended scope. Common in APIs with improperly enforced role-based access.

ownership_missing: ACL not enforced at individual object level
description: Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. Attacker accesses protected resources by bypassing improperly implemented access control lists at object level.

ownership_missing: valid credentials combined with object ID substitution to access other user data
description: Use of Known Credentials combined with BOLA. Valid stolen or enumerated credentials used to access other users resources via object ID manipulation.

ownership_missing: business logic data validation bypassed to access unauthorized objects
description: Test Business Logic Data Validation. Verify data cannot be manipulated to bypass authorization and ownership checks embedded in business logic flows.

ownership_missing: forged requests bypass object-level authorization checks
description: Test Ability to Forge Requests. Verify requests cannot be crafted to access resources belonging to other users by substituting object identifiers.

ownership_missing: integrity checks not applied to resource ownership metadata
description: Test Integrity Checks. Verify that integrity checks prevent unauthorized modification of resource ownership and that tampered requests are rejected.

ownership_missing: process timing exploited to bypass ownership validation
description: Test for Process Timing. Verify timing-based attacks cannot bypass object-level authorization checks through race conditions in business processes.

ownership_missing: no rate limiting on resource identifier enumeration
description: Test Number of Times a Function Can be Used. Verify rate limiting and enumeration controls prevent brute-force ID enumeration for BOLA exploitation.

ownership_missing: workflow steps circumvented to bypass authorization enforcement
description: Test Circumvention of Work Flows. Verify workflow steps cannot be skipped or reordered to bypass authorization checks and access unauthorized resources.

ownership_missing: systematic access pattern not detected as BOLA enumeration attack
description: Test Defenses Against Application Mis-use. Verify systematic sequential ID access patterns are detected and blocked as BOLA enumeration attacks.

ownership_missing: file upload metadata exploited to bypass object ownership checks
description: Test Upload of Unexpected File Types. Verify file upload cannot be exploited through malformed metadata to bypass resource ownership verification.

ownership_missing: malicious file payload bypasses ownership verification logic
description: Test Upload of Malicious Files. Verify malicious file payloads cannot be used to exploit upload handlers and bypass resource access controls.

ownership_missing: APIs display sensitive information without authorization check
description: Tabit - sensitive information disclosure. Several APIs on the web system display sensitive information without proper authorization checks on the requested resource.

ownership_missing: BOLA in Indico event management - event ownership not verified
description: Broken Object Level Authorization in Indico through v3.3.5. Unauthorized access to event data by manipulating eventId path parameter without ownership verification.

ownership_missing: user data returned without verifying userId matches JWT subject
description: BOLA vulnerability in hay-kot meali /api/users/{user-id}. Attacker accesses other users account data by substituting userId path parameter value.

ownership_missing: critical user data exposure via userId enumeration without JWT validation
description: High-severity BOLA in hay-kot meali /api/users/{user-id}. Critical user account data fully exposed via userId manipulation without ownership verification.

ownership_missing: household resource accessed without verifying household owner matches JWT
description: BOLA vulnerability in hay-kot meali /households. Unauthorized access to household resources via householdId path parameter substitution.

ownership_missing: object level authorization missing - resource ID not validated against JWT
description: BOLA vulnerability with missing object-level authorization. Resource identifier manipulation allows unauthorized access to other users private data.

ownership_missing: BOLA in API endpoint - user-controlled ID used without ownership check
description: Broken Object Level Authorization. User-controlled resource identifier used in API endpoint without ownership verification against authenticated user identity.

ownership_missing: IDOR via sequential integer IDs enables cross-user data access
description: Insecure Direct Object Reference. Sequential integer identifiers enable enumeration and unauthorized access to other users resources via predictable ID patterns.

ownership_missing: authorization bypass through object ID manipulation in resource endpoint
description: Authorization bypass vulnerability. Object-level authorization check absent for resource access endpoint allowing cross-user data disclosure via ID substitution.

ownership_missing: BOLA affects both read and write endpoints - ownership not enforced
description: BOLA vulnerability affecting read and modification endpoints. Missing ownership verification enables unauthorized data access and modification of other users resources.

ownership_missing: UUID-based IDOR - UUID format does not prevent ownership bypass
description: BOLA using UUID identifiers. Despite UUID format reducing enumeration risk, ownership is not verified against authenticated user identity enabling targeted access.

ownership_missing: BOLA enables both reading and deleting other users resources
description: High-impact BOLA vulnerability. Missing authorization allows attacker to read and delete resources belonging to other users via resource ID substitution.

ownership_missing: IDOR causes information disclosure via resource ID enumeration
description: IDOR vulnerability causing sensitive information disclosure. Resource identifiers can be manipulated to access private information belonging to other users.

ownership_missing: orders.user_id not compared to JWT.sub before access
description: E-commerce order resource. Requires: orders.user_id == JWT.sub. Any orderId can be accessed without check exposing full order history and PII.

ownership_missing: cart session binding not enforced for concurrent session abuse
description: Shopping cart bound to authenticated session. Cart must belong to current JWT user. Session token must be validated to prevent cart hijacking.

ownership_missing: review author_id not verified before allowing modification
description: Product review resource. GET is public. PUT/DELETE requires: reviews.author_id == JWT.sub. Risk of review manipulation or deletion by non-authors.

ownership_missing: shipping address ownership not verified before access exposing PII
description: User shipping address. Contains sensitive PII. Requires: addresses.user_id == JWT.sub for all operations. BOLA exposes name, phone, address data.

ownership_missing: wishlist ownership not verified enabling cross-user preference enumeration
description: User wishlist. Requires: wishlists.user_id == JWT.sub. Sequential IDs allow enumeration of other users product interests and purchase preferences.

ownership_missing: file uploader identity not verified on access despite UUID format
description: File storage resource. Requires: files.uploader_id == JWT.sub for non-public files. UUID format reduces enumeration but does not prevent targeted BOLA attacks.

ownership_missing: shared_with table not checked during file access authorization
description: Shared file resource. Access requires: files.uploader_id == JWT.sub OR file_shares.recipient_id == JWT.sub. Both owner and delegated recipients must be checked.

ownership_missing: public flag must be verified to prevent private file access via public endpoint
description: Public file resource. Accessible to all authenticated users. Must verify files.is_public == true before serving to prevent accessing private files via this endpoint.

ownership_missing: parent folder ownership chain not recursively verified
description: File folder with hierarchical ownership. Requires: folder.owner_id == JWT.sub AND all ancestor folders verified. Moving files between owned and unowned folders must be prevented.

ownership_missing: payment method ownership not verified before financial data access
description: Payment method containing sensitive financial data. Requires: payment_methods.user_id == JWT.sub. Enhanced verification recommended. BOLA exposes card numbers and billing details.

ownership_missing: both transaction parties not verified before financial data disclosure
description: Financial transaction resource. Access requires: transactions.sender_id == JWT.sub OR transactions.receiver_id == JWT.sub. Both transaction parties may view details.

ownership_missing: bank account user binding not enforced before critical financial access
description: Bank account resource. Highly sensitive financial data. Requires: bank_accounts.user_id == JWT.sub with additional authentication factor strongly recommended.

ownership_missing: PUT and DELETE ownership not enforced while GET is allowed public
description: Social media post. GET is public for authenticated users. PUT/DELETE requires: posts.author_id == JWT.sub OR JWT.role == admin. Risk of post hijacking on write endpoints.

ownership_missing: message sender and recipient both not verified before message access
description: Direct message resource. Highly sensitive. Requires: messages.sender_id == JWT.sub OR messages.recipient_id == JWT.sub. Sequential IDs enable mass PII exposure via enumeration.

ownership_missing: PUT operation profile ownership not verified allowing profile takeover
description: User profile resource. GET is public. PUT requires: userId path param == JWT.sub. BOLA on PUT endpoint enables unauthorized profile modification and account takeover.

ownership_missing: follow relationship ownership not verified on delete enabling manipulation
description: Follow relationship resource. Requires: follows.follower_id == JWT.sub for modification. BOLA enables removal of other users follow relationships and social graph manipulation.

ownership_missing: org membership and manager role not verified before employee data access
description: Employee resource in organization hierarchy. Requires: employees.org_id == user.org_id AND JWT.role in [manager, hr, admin]. Cross-organization HR data exposure risk.

ownership_missing: organization admin role not enforced for settings access enabling org takeover
description: Organization settings resource. Critical configuration data. Requires: JWT.role == admin AND user.org_id == orgId. BOLA enables full organization configuration takeover.

ownership_missing: team membership and org affiliation not verified before member management
description: Team membership resource. Requires: user.org_id == team.org_id AND JWT.role in [team_lead, admin]. Cross-team and cross-org member enumeration risk.

ownership_missing: org-level access control not enforced for business report retrieval
description: Business report resource. Sensitive operational data. Requires: reports.org_id == user.org_id AND JWT.role in [manager, analyst, admin]. Cross-org business intelligence exposure.

ownership_missing: notification recipient not verified enabling cross-user notification access
description: User notification resource. Requires: notifications.recipient_id == JWT.sub. Sequential IDs allow reading other users notifications disclosing private activity information.

ownership_missing: subscription holder not verified before billing data access or cancellation
description: Subscription resource with billing details. Requires: subscriptions.user_id == JWT.sub. BOLA exposes billing information and enables unauthorized subscription cancellation.

ownership_missing: org billing manager role not enforced for invoice retrieval
description: Invoice resource containing financial records. Requires: invoices.org_id == user.org_id AND JWT.role in [billing_manager, admin, accountant]. Financial document cross-org exposure.

ownership_missing: audit log access not restricted to authorized auditor roles
description: System audit log resource. Sensitive operational and security history. JWT.role must be in [auditor, admin]. BOLA enables unauthorized access to security event records.

ownership_missing: API key issuer not verified before credential disclosure or revocation
description: API key credential resource. Critical security asset. Requires: api_keys.owner_id == JWT.sub. BOLA enables credential theft and unauthorized service access or key revocation.
